description: Recurring routines for Phase 0 governance and growth operations.

routines.title: Daily growth telemetry anomaly scan
routines.purpose: Detect conversion, traffic, and funnel anomalies early.

routines.title: Daily manifesto compliance drift check
routines.purpose: Flag any growth initiative violating constitutional constraints.

routines.title: Weekly pipeline health and blockers review
routines.purpose: Review prospect progression, stuck deals, and intervention actions.

routines.title: Weekly institutional outreach follow-up
routines.purpose: Ensure anchor prospect outreach cadence and response quality.

routines.title: Weekly transparency draft delta
routines.purpose: Prepare public transparency updates with evidence links.

routines.title: Monthly KPI baseline reconciliation
routines.purpose: Reconcile source systems and lock baseline truth for reporting.

routines.title: Monthly risk and incident rehearsal
routines.purpose: Practice incident and ethics response pathways before crises.

routines.title: Quarterly standards and policy influence review
routines.purpose: Track standards traction, policy opportunities, and strategic positioning.
